stemHtml: Assuming a constant angle of attack, which of the following options correctly describes the relationship between the coefficient of drag (CD) and the Mach Number of an aeroplane with a supercritical aerofoil?

options.a: As the aeroplane accelerates between MCRIT and Mach Drag Divergence (MDD), the CD will increase significantly to reach its maximum value by MDD.
options.b: At speeds above MCRIT, the CD will increase in a non-linear fashion, where flying at speeds slightly above MCRIT only leads to a slight increase in CD.
options.c: As the aeroplane accelerates between MCRIT and Mach Drag Divergence (MDD), the CD will reduce slightly until MDD, after which the CD will significantly increase.
options.d: At speeds above Mach Drag Divergence (MDD), the CD will increase until reaching its maximum value by MCRIT or Mach 1, whichever occurs earlier.
